violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Store pickles away from raw beef and raw pork in reach in cooler. Store cooked beef away from raw beef in Upright 2 door cooler.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of smoked meats being vacuum sealed. Contact OHP for clarity on need for HACCP plan involving smoked, ready to eat food items being vacuum sealed.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Sponge-like anti-slip pad used for meat slicer.
